_comment: Example of a well-designed MCP tool definition for the Apicurio Registry MCP server. This shows how to structure a tool with typed parameters, rich descriptions, and sensible defaults so that an AI agent can discover and use it correctly.
name: search_artifacts
description: Search for artifacts across all groups in the Apicurio Registry. Returns artifacts matching the specified filter criteria. Unlike list_artifacts (which returns all artifacts in a single group), search_artifacts works across all groups and supports flexible text-based filtering. Results are paginated — use 'offset' and 'limit' to navigate large result sets. Returns up to 20 results by default, maximum 500 per request.

name.description: Filter by artifact name. Performs a case-insensitive substring match. Example: 'user' matches 'user-event', 'UserProfile', and 'new-user-created'.

description.description: Filter by artifact description. Performs a case-insensitive substring match on the artifact's description metadata field.

groupId.description: Filter by group ID to limit search to a specific group. Use 'default' for the default group. Omit to search across all groups.

labels.description: Filter by labels. Returns only artifacts that have ALL of the specified labels. Labels are case-sensitive. Example: ['kafka', 'production'] returns artifacts labeled with both 'kafka' AND 'production'.

artifactType.description: Filter by artifact type. Only returns artifacts of the specified type. Use get_artifact_types to see all supported types for this registry instance.

offset.description: Pagination offset (0-based). Skip this many results before returning. Default: 0. Use in combination with 'limit' to paginate through large result sets.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per request. Default: 20. Maximum: 500. If the total result count exceeds this limit, use 'offset' to fetch subsequent pages.

orderby.description: Field to order results by. Default ordering is by 'name'. Use 'createdOn' to see newest/oldest artifacts, 'modifiedOn' to see recently changed artifacts.

order.description: Sort order direction. 'asc' for ascending (A-Z, oldest first), 'desc' for descending (Z-A, newest first). Default: 'asc'.

_example_calls._description: Find all Avro schemas related to Kafka
List all production schemas, newest first
Get the second page of results from the reddit-realtime group

artifacts.name: Reddit Post Raw Schema
artifacts.description: Raw Reddit post ingested from the Reddit API before enrichment

artifacts.name: Reddit Post Enriched Schema
artifacts.description: Reddit post enriched with sentiment analysis and topic classification
